raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is leveraging a historic budget surplus to open windows of opportunity.",
    "The 2022-23 California State budget includes a record amount of investment in the future of California.",
    "California has a record $37.2 billion in reserves, which is a 50% increase from last year.",
    "The 2022-23 budget is an historic opportunity for California to set a robust path to recovery after the pandemic.",
    "The UC/CSU Cal-Bridge PhD program aims to diversify the State’s science and technology workforce.",
    "Funding is being allocated to make Sweet Shade park in Irvine accessible for all abilities with a focus on STEM inspired play.",
    "$21 billion is designated for a Climate and Energy Package to address various climate-related challenges.",
    "$9 billion will provide relief to Californians affected by high gas prices and inflation.",
    "The budget includes $9 billion in increased investments in education compared to the previous year.",
    "$750 million in grants and $1.8 billion in zero-interest loans are earmarked for student housing.",
    "Proposition 98 per pupil spending has increased to $17,011, up from $11,704 when the Assemblywoman first took office.",
    "$2 billion is added for various housing programs.",
    "$1.3 billion is allocated for relief to small businesses and non-profits.",
    "$420 million is set aside for mitigation efforts to protect the California coast from sea-level rise.",
    "AB 65 prioritizes green, natural infrastructure for sea-level rise protection without harming habitats.",
    "$350 million is designated for the CalHOME Program to support low- and very low-income households in homeownership.",
    "$164 million will fund food banks across the state through the CalFood Program.",
    "$22 million is allocated for a fentanyl taskforce and contraband interdiction."
  ]
}
```
